scripts.build: npm run build -w @automagent/schema && npm run build -w automagent
scripts.test: npm run test -w @automagent/schema && npm run test -w automagent
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @automagent/schema && npm run lint -w automagent
scripts.clean: npm run clean -w @automagent/schema && npm run clean -w automagent
